headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Progressive, Raises Price Target to $331
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Joshua Shanker   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $320 to $331.

headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Exciting Potential
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.
